title: API Keys
subtitle: Manage API keys for agent authentication
emptyMessage: No API keys yet. Create one to get started.

dialog.keyCreated: Your new API key has been created. Copy it now — you won't be able to see it again.
dialog.keyWarning: Make sure to copy this key now. You will not be able to view it again.

confirm.revokeDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke this API Key? Agents using it will no longer be able to connect. This action cannot be undone.

validation.nameRequired: Please enter a name for the key
